f : ℕ → ℝ → ℝ

a b : ℝ

ε : ℝ
hε : 0 < ε
N : ℕ
hN : ∀ n ≥ N, ∀ (M : ℕ), |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| < ε / 4
n : ℕ
hn : n ≥ N
m : ℕ
hmn : m ≥ n
M1 M2 : ℕ
M : ℕ := M1 + M2
hM1 : |(fun N => RiemannSum (f n) a b N) M - ℓ n| < ε / 4
hM2 : |(fun N => RiemannSum (f m) a b N) M - ℓ m| < ε / 4
hNn : |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| < ε / 4
hNm : |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| < ε / 4
⊢ |ℓ m - ℓ n| ≤
    |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n| + |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| +
        |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| +
      |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - ℓ m|

proof:
calc |ℓ m - ℓ n|
        _ ≤ |ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - ℓ n| := abs_sub_le _ _ _
        _ ≤ |ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M| + (|RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |RiemannSum F a b M - ℓ n|) := add_le_add_left (abs_sub_le _ _ _) _
        _ ≤ |ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M| + (|RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + (|RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f n) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n|)) := add_le_add_left (add_le_add_left (abs_sub_le _ _ _) _) _
        _ = |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n| + |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - ℓ m| := by
          rw [abs_sub_comm (ℓ m), abs_sub_comm (RiemannSum F a b M)]
          linarith
successful_attempts:
calc |ℓ m - ℓ n|
        _ ≤ |ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - ℓ n| := abs_sub_le _ _ _
        _ ≤ |ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M| + (|RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |RiemannSum F a b M - ℓ n|) := add_le_add_left (abs_sub_le _ _ _) _
        _ ≤ |ℓ m - RiemannSum (f m) a b M| + (|RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + (|RiemannSum F a b M - RiemannSum (f n) a b M| + |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n|)) := add_le_add_left (add_le_add_left (abs_sub_le _ _ _) _) _
        _ = |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - ℓ n| + |RiemannSum (f n) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - RiemannSum F a b M| + |RiemannSum (f m) a b M - ℓ m| := by
          rw [abs_sub_comm (ℓ m), abs_sub_comm (RiemannSum F a b M)]
          linarith

            simp only [List.getElem_cons_succ, List.eraseIdx_cons_succ]
            exact ((ih tl (Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ hi)).cons hd).trans (List.Perm.swap _ _ _)
      have h1 := h l1 idx1 hidx1
      have h2 := h l2 idx2 hidx2
      rw [heq] at h1
      exact (h1.symm.trans (hperm.trans h2)).cons_inv

case cons

l₁✝ l₂✝ : List α

  ∀ {idx1 : Fin l₁✝.length} {idx2 : Fin l₂✝.length},
    l₁✝[idx1] = l₂✝[idx2] → (l₁✝.eraseIdx ↑idx1).Perm (l₂✝.eraseIdx ↑idx2)
⊢ ∀ {idx1 : Fin (x :: l₁✝).length} {idx2 : Fin (x :: l₂✝).length},
    (x :: l₁✝)[idx1] = (x :: l₂✝)[idx2] → ((x :: l₁✝).eraseIdx ↑idx1).Perm ((x :: l₂✝).eraseIdx ↑idx2)

case swap
α : Type u_1
l1 l2 : List α
x y : α
l : List α
⊢ ∀ {idx1 : Fin (y :: x :: l).length} {idx2 : Fin (x :: y :: l).length},
    (y :: x :: l)[idx1] = (x :: y :: l)[idx2] → ((y :: x :: l).eraseIdx ↑idx1).Perm ((x :: y :: l).eraseIdx ↑idx2)

proof:
intro i1 i2 heq
          have h_as {ls : List α} (i : Fin ls.length) : ls.Perm (ls[i] :: ls.eraseIdx i) := by
            induction ls with
            | nil => exact i.elim0
            | cons a ls ih =>
              cases i using Fin.cases with
              | zero => exact List.Perm.refl _
              | succ i => exact (ih i).cons a |>.trans (List.Perm.swap (ls[i]) a (ls.eraseIdx i))
          exact List.Perm.cons_inv (heq ▸ (h_as i1).symm.trans ((List.Perm.swap x y l).trans (h_as i2)))

intro i1 i2 heq
          have h_as {ls : List α} (i : Fin ls.length) : ls.Perm (ls[i] :: ls.eraseIdx i) := by
            induction ls with

            | cons a ls ih =>
              cases i using Fin.cases with
              | zero => exact List.Perm.refl _
              | succ i => exact (ih i).cons a |>.trans (List.Perm.swap (ls[i]) a (ls.eraseIdx i))
          exact List.Perm.cons_inv (heq ▸ (h_as i1).symm.trans ((List.Perm.swap x y l).trans (h_as i2)))

      ∀ {n : ℕ},
        1 < n →
          ∀ {S : Finset P},
            S.card = n →
              ((↑S).Pairwise fun x y => 1 ≤ dist x y) →
                ∃ l,
                  finrank ℝ ↥l.direction = 1 ∧
                    (∃ p₁ p₂, p₁ ∈ S ∧ p₂ ∈ S ∧ l.SOppSide p₁ p₂) ∧ ∀ p ∈ S, c * ↑n ^ (-1 / 3) ≤ Metric.infDist p ↑l

c : Fin (4 * n) → Fin n
h : ∀ (i : Fin n), {j | c j = i}.card = 4
⊢ ∃ S, ∑ i ∈ S, (↑i + 1) = ∑ i ∈ Sᶜ, (↑i + 1) ∧ ∀ (i : Fin n), {j ∈ S | c j = i}.card = 2

⊢ {n |
      1 < n ∧
        ∀ (deck : Fin n → ℕ),
          (∀ (i : Fin n), 0 < deck i) →
            (Pairwise fun j k => ∃ S, S.Nonempty ∧ (↑(deck j) + ↑(deck k)) / 2 = (∏ i ∈ S, ↑(deck i)) ^ (1 / ↑S.card)) →
              ∀ (i j : Fin n), deck i = deck j} =
    IMO2020P5.answer

a b c d : ℝ
hd0 : 0 < d
hdc : d ≤ c
hcb : c ≤ b
hba : b ≤ a
h1 : a + b + c + d = 1
⊢ (a + 2 * b + 3 * c + 4 * d) * a ^ a * b ^ b * c ^ c * d ^ d < 1

proof:
have hd : 0 < d := hd0
  have hc : 0 < c := by linarith
  have hb : 0 < b := by linarith
  have ha : 0 < a := by linarith
  have h_am_gm : a ^ a * b ^ b * c ^ c * d ^ d ≤ a ^ 2 + b ^ 2 + c ^ 2 + d ^ 2 := by
    let w : Fin 4 → ℝ := ![a, b, c, d]
    let x : Fin 4 → ℝ := ![a, b, c, d]
    have hw : ∀ i, 0 ≤ w i := by intro i; fin_cases i <;> simp [w] <;> linarith
    have hw_sum : (Finset.univ : Finset (Fin 4)).sum w = 1 := by simp [Fin.sum_univ_four, w, h1]

proof:
intro y
  by_contra! hgy
  let M := ⨆ x, |f x|
  have hM_bdd : BddAbove (Set.range fun x => |f x|) := ⟨1, Set.forall_mem_range.mpr h₂⟩
  have hM_pos : 0 < M := by
    push_neg at h₁
    rcases h₁ with ⟨x₀, hx₀⟩
    exact (abs_pos.mpr hx₀).trans_le (le_ciSup hM_bdd x₀)
  have h_le : ∀ x, |f x| ≤ M / |g y| := by
    intro x
    have h_eq : |f (x + y) + f (x - y)| = 2 * |f x| * |g y| := by
      rw [h₀ x y, abs_mul, abs_mul, abs_of_pos (show (0 : ℝ) < 2 by norm_num)]
    have h_bdd : |f (x + y) + f (x - y)| ≤ 2 * M := by
      calc |f (x + y) + f (x - y)|
        _ ≤ |f (x + y)| + |f (x - y)| := abs_add _ _
        _ ≤ M + M := add_le_add (le_ciSup hM_bdd (x + y)) (le_ciSup hM_bdd (x - y))
        _ = 2 * M := by ring
    rw [h_eq] at h_bdd
    have hgy_pos : 0 < |g y| := by linarith
    rw [le_div_iff₀ hgy_pos]
    linarith
  have hM_le : M ≤ M / |g y| := ciSup_le h_le
  have : |g y| ≤ 1 := by
    have hgy_pos : 0 < |g y| := by linarith
    have hMgy_le_M : M * |g y| ≤ M := (le_div_iff₀ hgy_pos).mp hM_le
    exact (mul_le_iff_le_one_right hM_pos).mp hMgy_le_M
  exact hgy.not_le this

h_u_vs_u'_len₂ : u.len ≤ u'.len

leftOfVarCount₂ : { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len } := ⟨↑leftOfVarCount, ⋯⟩

      have h_v_lt : v < label := lt_of_le_of_ne (le_of_not_lt h_lt) h_ne

inst✝ : DecidableEq V
G : SimpleGraph V
u v : V
p : @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk V G u v
⊢ ∑ e, @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edgeCount V inst✝ G u v p ↑e = @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.length V G u v p

proof:
have hl_darts : p.darts.length = p.length := by
    induction p with
    | nil => rfl
    | cons _ _ ih => simp [darts, length, ih]
    | loop _ ih => simp [darts, length, ih]
  have hl : p.edges.length = p.length := by
    simp [edges, hl_darts]
  rw [← hl, edgeSet, Finset.sum_coe_sort]
  have h_count : ∀ e, edgeCount p e = p.edges.count e := by
    intro e
    unfold edgeCount
    rw [List.count_eq_countP]
    apply List.countP_congr
    intro x _
    simp [eq_comm, BEq.beq]
  simp [h_count, List.sum_toFinset_count_eq_length]
successful_attempts:
have hl_darts : p.darts.length = p.length := by
    induction p with
    | nil => rfl
    | cons _ _ ih => simp [darts, length, ih]
    | loop _ ih => simp [darts, length, ih]
  have hl : p.edges.length = p.length := by
    simp [edges, hl_darts]
  rw [← hl, edgeSet, Finset.sum_coe_sort]
  have h_count : ∀ e, edgeCount p e = p.edges.count e := by
    intro e
    unfold edgeCount
    rw [List.count_eq_countP]
    apply List.countP_congr
    intro x _

  simp [h_count, List.sum_toFinset_count_eq_length]

        (some (Clap.Spec.share p i)).bind fun a =>
          Option.bind (Clap.Spec.eq0 p (@HAdd.hAdd (Clap.Spec.F p) (Clap.Spec.F p) (Clap.Spec.F p) instHAdd a i))
            fun x => some (Clap.Spec.accept ()))
    (Circuit.eval ?c)

    wf G cl cr → List.Forall (fun entry => entry.l = (Exp.c entry.r.2).eval) G → cl ≈ Clap.Dedup.dedup F inst✝ F cr

X : ι → Ω → E
iIndepFun_X : iIndepFun X μ
integral_X : ∀ (i : ι), ∫ (ω : Ω), X i ω ∂μ = 0
memLp_X : ∀ i ∈ A, MemLp (X i) (2 * ↑m) μ
X₁ : ι → Ω × Ω → E := fun i => X i ∘ Prod.fst
X₂ : ι → Ω × Ω → E := fun i => X i ∘ Prod.snd
X' : ι → Ω × Ω → E := fun i => X₁ i - X₂ i
this : DecidableEq ι
⊢ ∫ (ω : Ω), ‖∑ i ∈ A, X i ω‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ ≤ ∫ (ω : Ω × Ω), ‖∑ i ∈ A, X' i ω‖ ^ (2 * m) ∂μ.prod μ

⊢ Time.deriv (ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.trajectory S IC) t = 0 ↔
    ‖ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.trajectory S IC t‖ =
      √(‖ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.x₀ IC‖ ^ 2 +
          (‖ClassicalMechanics.HarmonicOscillator.InitialConditions.v₀ IC‖ / S.ω) ^ 2)

proof:
have hE := congr_fun (trajectory_energy S IC) t
  simp [energy, kineticEnergy, potentialEnergy, real_inner_self_eq_norm_sq] at hE
  have h_nonneg : 0 ≤ ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2 := add_nonneg (sq_nonneg _) (sq_nonneg _)
  have h_k : S.k = S.m * S.ω ^ 2 := by rw [ω_sq S]; field_simp [S.m_pos.ne', S.ω_neq_zero]
  constructor
  · intro h_vel
    rw [h_vel] at hE
    simp at hE
    have h_sq : ‖IC.trajectory S t‖ ^ 2 = ‖IC.x₀‖ ^ 2 + (‖IC.v₀‖ / S.ω) ^ 2 := by
      rw [h_k] at hE
      field_simp [S.m_pos.ne', S.ω_neq_zero] at hE ⊢
      nlinarith [S.m_pos]
    rw [← Real.sqrt_sq (norm_nonneg _), h_sq]
  · intro h_pos
    rw [h_pos, Real.sq_sqrt h_nonneg] at hE
    rw [h_k] at hE
    field_simp [S.m_pos.ne', S.ω_neq_zero] at hE
    have h_v_sq : ‖∂ₜ (IC.trajectory S) t‖ ^ 2 = 0 := by nlinarith [S.m_pos]
    exact norm_eq_zero.mp (sq_eq_zero_iff.mp h_v_sq)

            ((↑((pinching_map (σ'' n)) (statePow ρ n))).log - (↑(σ'' n)).log)
            (@SteinsLemma.commute_aux✝ (H (i ^ n)) (FinH (i ^ n)) (DecEqH (i ^ n)) n
              (ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε) + ε2) (E1 ε2 n) ↑((pinching_map (σ'' n)) (statePow ρ n))
              ↑(σ'' n) ⋯ ⋯)) ≤
        (↑((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n))).inner ((ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R1✝¹ ι inst✝ i ρ ε) + ε2) • E1 ε2 n)
hE2leq :
  ∀ (ε2 : ℝ) (n : ℕ),
    0 < ε2 →
      (1 / ↑n) • ↑(E2 ε2 n) * (↑(↑((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n))).log - ↑(↑(σ'' n)).log) ≤
        (ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ) + ε₀ + ε2) • ↑(E2 ε2 n)
c' : ℝ → ℕ → ℝ := fun ε2 n => max (c n + c n / ↑n) (ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ) + ε₀ + ε2)
hc' : ∀ (ε2 : ℕ → NNReal), (∀ (n : ℕ), ε2 n < 1) → ∃ C, ∀ᶠ (n : ℕ) in Filter.atTop, c' (↑(ε2 n)) n ≤ ↑C
hσ'' : ∀ (ε2 : ℝ) (n : ℕ), Real.exp (-↑n * c' ε2 n) • 1 ≤ ↑(σ'' n)
ε2✝ : ℝ
n✝ : ℕ
ε2 : ℝ
n : ℕ
hε2 : 0 < ε2
⊢ (1 / ↑n) • ↑(E3 ε2 n) * (↑(↑((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n))).log - ↑(↑(σ'' n)).log) ≤ (1 / n) • ↑(E3 ε2 n) * -↑(↑(σ'' n)).log

ι : Type u_1
inst✝ : UnitalFreeStateTheory ι
i : ι
ρ : MState (H i)
ε : Prob
hε : 0 < ε ∧ ε < 1
σ : (n : ℕ) → ↑IsFree
ε' : Prob
hε'₁ : 0 < ε'
hε'₂ : ε' < ε
hR1R2 : @SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε < @SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ
hR1 : @SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε ≠ ⊤
hR2 : @SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ ≠ ⊤
ε₀ : ℝ := (@SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ - @SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε).toReal * (↑ε - ↑ε') / (1 - ↑ε)
hε₀ : 0 < ε₀
hε₀' : ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε) ≤ ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ) + ε₀
m : ℕ
hm : m ≥ 1 ∧ 𝐃(statePow ρ m‖↑(σ m)) / ↑m < @SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ + ↑⟨ε₀, ⋯⟩
σ₁ : MState (H i)
hσ₁_pos : σ₁.m.PosDef
hσ₁_free : IsFree σ₁
«σ̃» : (n : ℕ) → MState (H (i ^ n)) := fun n => @SteinsLemma.Lemma6_σn ι inst✝ i m σ₁ (↑(σ m)) n
σ_max_exists : ∀ (n : ℕ), ∃ x ∈ IsFree, IsMaxOn (fun σ => OptimalHypothesisRate (statePow ρ n) ε {σ}) IsFree x
«σ⋆» : (n : ℕ) → MState (H (i ^ n)) := fun n => Classical.choose ⋯
σ' : (n : ℕ) → MState (H (i ^ n)) := fun n => ⟨2 / 3, ⋯⟩[⟨1 / 2, ⋯⟩[«σ̃» n↔«σ⋆» n]↔statePow σ₁ n]
σ'_free : ∀ (n : ℕ), IsFree (σ' n)
σ'_posdef : ∀ (n : ℕ), (σ' n).m.PosDef
mineig : ℝ := ⨅ i_1, ⋯.eigenvalues i_1
h_min_pos : 0 < mineig
h_min_le_one : mineig ≤ 1
c : ℕ → ℝ := fun n => Real.log (1 / mineig) + Real.log 3 / ↑(max n 1)
hc : ∀ (n : ℕ), 0 < c n
hc_lim : Filter.Tendsto (fun n => c n / ↑n) Filter.atTop (nhds 0)
f : ℕ → ℝ → ℝ := fun n lam => ↑⌈Real.log lam / c n⌉ * c n
h_le_f : ∀ (n : ℕ) (lam : ℝ), Real.log lam ≤ f n lam
h_f_le : ∀ (n : ℕ) (lam : ℝ), f n lam < Real.log lam + c n
σ''_unnormalized : (n : ℕ) → HermitianMat (H (i ^ n)) ℂ := fun n => (↑(σ' n)).cfc fun e => Real.exp (f n e)
σ''_unnormalized_PosDef : ∀ (n : ℕ), (↑(σ''_unnormalized n)).PosDef
h_exp_f : ∀ (n : ℕ) (x : ℝ), 0 < x → x ≤ Real.exp (f n x) ∧ Real.exp (f n x) < Real.exp (c n) * x
σ''_tr_bounds : ∀ (n : ℕ), 1 ≤ (σ''_unnormalized n).trace ∧ (σ''_unnormalized n).trace < Real.exp (c n)
σ'' : (n : ℕ) → MState (H (i ^ n)) :=
  fun n => { M := (σ''_unnormalized n).trace⁻¹ • σ''_unnormalized n, zero_le := ⋯, tr := ⋯ }
σ''_posdef : ∀ (n : ℕ), (↑↑(σ'' n)).PosDef
σ'_le_σ'' : ∀ (n : ℕ), Real.exp (-c n) • ↑(σ' n) ≤ ↑(σ'' n)
σ''_le_σ' : ∀ (n : ℕ), ↑(σ'' n) ≤ Real.exp (c n) • ↑(σ' n)
ℰ : (n : ℕ) → CPTPMap (H (i ^ n)) (H (i ^ n)) ℂ := fun n => pinching_map (σ'' n)
hσ'n_eq_sum_third : ∀ (n : ℕ), ↑(σ' n) = (1 / 3) • ↑(«σ̃» n) + (1 / 3) • ↑(«σ⋆» n) + (1 / 3) • ↑(statePow σ₁ n)
hσ₁_le_σ' : ∀ (n : ℕ), (1 / 3) • ↑(statePow σ₁ n) ≤ ↑(σ' n)
hliminf :
  Filter.liminf (fun n => 𝐃(statePow ρ n‖σ' n) / ↑n) Filter.atTop =
    Filter.liminf (fun n => 𝐃((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n)‖σ'' n) / ↑n) Filter.atTop
«hσ''_ge_σ⋆» : ∀ (n : ℕ), ↑(σ'' n) ≥ (Real.exp (-c n) / 3) • ↑(«σ⋆» n)
«hσ''_ge_σ̃» : ∀ (n : ℕ), ↑(σ'' n) ≥ (Real.exp (-c n) / 3) • ↑(«σ̃» n)
hσ''_ge_σ₁ : ∀ (n : ℕ), ↑(σ'' n) ≥ (Real.exp (-c n) / 3) • ↑(statePow σ₁ n)
hc_littleO : (fun n => c n + Real.log 3) =o[Filter.atTop] fun x => ↑x
hliminf_le :
  Filter.liminf (fun n => (OptimalHypothesisRate ((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n)) ε {σ'' n}).negLog / ↑n) Filter.atTop ≤
    ↑(ENNReal.toNNReal (@SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε))
hlimsup_le :
  ∀ (ε1 : Prob),
    0 < ↑ε1 ∧ ↑ε1 < 1 →
      Filter.limsup (fun n => (OptimalHypothesisRate ((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n)) (1 - ε1) {σ'' n}).negLog / ↑n)
          Filter.atTop ≤
        ↑(ENNReal.toNNReal (@SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ) + ⟨ε₀, ⋯⟩)
P1 : ℝ → (n : ℕ) → HermitianMat (H (i ^ n)) ℂ :=
  fun ε2 n =>
    (Real.exp (↑n * (ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε) + ε2)) • ↑(σ'' n)).proj_le ↑((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n))
P2 : ℝ → (n : ℕ) → HermitianMat (H (i ^ n)) ℂ :=
  fun ε2 n =>
    (Real.exp (↑n * (ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ) + ε₀ + ε2)) • ↑(σ'' n)).proj_le
      ↑((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n))
hPcomm : ∀ (ε2 : ℝ) (n : ℕ), Commute ↑(P1 ε2 n) ↑(P2 ε2 n)
hliminfP1 :
  ∀ (ε2 : NNReal),
    0 < ε2 → Filter.liminf (fun n => (P1 (↑ε2) n).inner ↑((fun n => (ℰ n) (statePow ρ n)) n)) Filter.atTop ≤ 1 - ↑ε
hlimsupP2 :
  ∀ (ε2 : NNReal),
    0 < ε2 →
      ∀ (ε1 : Prob),
        0 < ↑ε1 ∧ ↑ε1 < 1 →
          Filter.limsup
              (fun n =>
                ((Real.exp (↑n * (↑(ENNReal.toNNReal (@SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ) + ⟨ε₀, ⋯⟩) + ↑ε2)) •
                          ↑(σ'' n)).proj_le
                      ↑((fun n => (ℰ n) (statePow ρ n)) n)).inner
                  ↑((fun n => (ℰ n) (statePow ρ n)) n))
              Filter.atTop ≤
            1 - ↑(1 - ε1)
hlimsupP2' : ∀ (ε2 : ℝ), 0 < ε2 → Filter.limsup (fun n => (P2 ε2 n).inner ↑((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n))) Filter.atTop = 0
E1 : ℝ → (n : ℕ) → HermitianMat (H (i ^ n)) ℂ := 1 - P1
E2 : ℝ → (n : ℕ) → HermitianMat (H (i ^ n)) ℂ := P1 - P2
E3 : ℝ → (n : ℕ) → HermitianMat (H (i ^ n)) ℂ := P2
Esum : E1 + E2 + E3 = 1
hE1proj :
  ∀ (ε2 : ℝ) (n : ℕ),
    E1 ε2 n =
      (↑((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n))).proj_lt
        (Real.exp (↑n * (ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε) + ε2)) • ↑(σ'' n))
hE2leProj :
  ∀ (ε2 : ℝ) (n : ℕ),
    E2 ε2 n ≤
      (↑((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n))).proj_lt
        (Real.exp (↑n * (ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ) + ε₀ + ε2)) • ↑(σ'' n))
hE1leq :
  ∀ (ε2 : ℝ) (n : ℕ),
    0 < ε2 →
      (↑((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n))).inner
          (@SteinsLemma.HermitianMat.mul_commute (H (i ^ n)) (FinH (i ^ n)) ((1 / ↑n) • E1 ε2 n)
            ((↑((pinching_map (σ'' n)) (statePow ρ n))).log - (↑(σ'' n)).log)
            (@SteinsLemma.commute_aux✝ (H (i ^ n)) (FinH (i ^ n)) (DecEqH (i ^ n)) n
              (ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R1✝ ι inst✝ i ρ ε) + ε2) (E1 ε2 n) ↑((pinching_map (σ'' n)) (statePow ρ n))
              ↑(σ'' n) ⋯ ⋯)) ≤
        (↑((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n))).inner ((ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R1✝¹ ι inst✝ i ρ ε) + ε2) • E1 ε2 n)
hE2leq :
  ∀ (ε2 : ℝ) (n : ℕ),
    0 < ε2 →
      (1 / ↑n) • ↑(E2 ε2 n) * (↑(↑((ℰ n) (statePow ρ n))).log - ↑(↑(σ'' n)).log) ≤
        (ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ) + ε₀ + ε2) • ↑(E2 ε2 n)
c' : ℝ → ℕ → ℝ := fun ε2 n => max (c n + c n / ↑n) (ENNReal.toReal (@SteinsLemma.R2✝ ι inst✝ i ρ σ) + ε₀ + ε2)
hc' : ∀ (ε2 : ℕ → NNReal), (∀ (n : ℕ), ε2 n < 1) → ∃ C, ∀ᶠ (n : ℕ) in Filter.atTop, c' (↑(ε2 n)) n ≤ ↑C
hσ'' : ∀ (ε2 : ℝ) (n : ℕ), Real.exp (-↑n * c' ε2 n) • 1 ≤ ↑(σ'' n)
ε2✝ : ℝ
n✝ : ℕ
ε2 : ℝ
n : ℕ
hε2 : 0 < ε2
hlog : 0 ≤ ↑(↑(σ'' n)).log - ↑(Real.exp (-(↑n * c' ε2 n)) • 1).log
⊢ Commute (↑(E3 ε2 n)) (↑(↑(σ'' n)).log - ↑(Real.exp (-(↑n * c' ε2 n)) • 1).log)
